Krishna Consciousness, Happiness and Pleasure Meditation.
Oh!
The mystics derive unlimited transcendental pleasures from the Absolute Truth.
And therefore the Supreme Absolute Truth, the personality of Godhead is also known as
Rama.
This is from Chaitanya.
in Charitamritra. Introduction. We are Satchitananda. We always seek bliss or feel good. There are
two kinds of bliss, happiness and pleasure. Let us understand happiness and pleasure.
Happiness means feel good derived from the state of being or existence. Happiness is
also called existential bliss or meditative bliss. Pleasure means feel good derived from
an activity. Pleasure is also called a situational bliss or interactive bliss. Happiness always
gives pleasure, but pleasure does not always give happiness. There are two kinds of pleasures.
There are healthy, nutritious pleasures.
And unhealthy, poisonous pleasures. Healthy pleasures give us happiness.
Unhealthy pleasures give us suffering. An intelligent person indulges only in healthy
pleasures that expand his happiness. Now let us see what is soul happiness and soul pleasure.
Soul happiness means antasukha or feel good
burnt and blissful. Our realtà is the only unnatural pleasure of happiness.
Soul happiness means to uh maior satsang or the method of being
to melding both the soul, happiness with him. This meaning is the highest taste that
Krishna speaks about in the Bhagavad kīta's second chapter.
And atmak is the other meaning. Anantasukha means the wealth of the soul.
Soul happiness means not mask your soul or Testing.

source of happiness. Soul pleasure means Ananda or Bhakti Rasa from doing
devotional service. Soul pleasure means Hrishikena Hrishikesha Sevanam Bhakti

Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, thank you for revealing my Anta Sukha of what
Lord Chaitanya said to Sanatana Goswami. Prabhu kahet tomara deha mora nija dhana
tumi more kariyache atma samarpanah. Your body
is my property. You have already surrendered unto me. Therefore, you
no longer have any claim to your body. I rejoice in the Ananda that I have
surrendered my soul and body to Srila Prabhupada and I have no more claim on
my body. Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, thank you for revealing my Anta Sukha
that I have no birth, death, old age and disease.
I rejoice in the Ananda that I am eternal and deathless.
Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, thank you for revealing my Anta Sukha that I am of divine
quality like Krishna and not the quality of this matter. I rejoice in the Ananda that
my soul is of the same quality as Krishna's. Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, thank you
revealing my Anta Sukha that I am an eternal person of pure knowledge and
bliss. I rejoice in the Ananda of being Satchitananda eternity in knowledge and
bliss. Shila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu thank you for revealing my Anta Sukha
that my real ego is a beautiful loving servant ego and not the false ego of
this body I rejoice in the Ananda of my true beautiful pure ego. Shila Prabhupada
and Nama Prabhu thank you for revealing may Anta Sukha that Krishna is a supreme
person who is an unlimited ocean of Ananda and known is equal to or greater
than Him. I rejoice in the Ananda of appreciating
and tricking only one, one true and true He is . I rejoice in the Ananda of appreciating and
spreading Krishna's supremacy over everything and everyone.
Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, thank you for revealing my Anta Sukha that you are unequalled
in wealth, power, brilliance, beauty, fame and renunciation and are an unlimited reservoir
of these opulences.
I rejoice in the ananda of meditating on Krishna as Bhagavan, the possessor of all opulences.
Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, thank you for revealing my Anta Sukha that everyone
and everything in existence is owned and controlled by you.
I rejoice in the ananda of seeing everything and everyone as Krishna's property.
Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, thank you for revealing my Anta Sukha that you alone
are the giver and taker of everything from everyone as per your arrangement of Kala and
Karma.
I rejoice in the ananda that Krishna is in my heart, he is my only permanent friend and
nothing that I have now will remain with me permanently.
Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, thank you for revealing my anta sukha, that everyone
and everything is working willingly or unwillingly as per your plans and pleasures.
I rejoice in the ananda that everyone is working either directly or indirectly as per Krishna's
plans and pleasures.
Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, thank you for revealing my anta sukha, that you loved
me always, love me now and will always love me and eternally respect my freedom.
I rejoice in the ananda that Krishna eternally loves me with unconditional respect for my
free will.
Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, thank you for revealing my anta sukha, that Krishna
maintains infinite, unique personality.
I rejoice in the ananda that Krishna cares and loves and seeks loving relationship with
one and all as his dear children.
Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, thank you for revealing my anta sukha, that Krishna's
madhuriya or sweetness of his personal loving exchanges is beyond his Aishwarya nature.
I rejoice in the ananda of unlimited possibility.
I rejoice in the ananda of unlimited possibility of hearing and chanting Krishna's sweet loving
exchanges with his devotees.
I rejoice in remembering his loving exchanges with me all throughout my life.
Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, thank you for revealing my anta sukha, that I can permanently
possess you in unalloyed love and can possess nothing else in existence.
I rejoice in the ananda of striving with determination, patience and confidence to serve and serve
you.
I rejoice in the ananda of living a life that is full of happiness, peace and harmony
and is content in the world of God.
I rejoice in the ananda of belief, peace and peace for the Lord. I rejoice in the ananda of
and confidence to develop unalloyed love for Krishna.
Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, thank you for revealing my anta-sukha, that I eternally
belong to you, to be enjoyed by you, exactly as a chaste wife who belongs to her husband
in love.
I rejoice in the ananda of myself belonging to Krishna alone and being an object of enjoyment
for him.
Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, thank you for revealing my anta-sukha, that you are
longing for me and wanting to reconnect with me.
I rejoice in the ananda to know that Krishna takes ten steps towards me, if I take one
step towards him.
Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, thank you for revealing my anta-sukha, that your personality
can never be known fully by anyone.
Yet you are conscious of me.
I rejoice in the ananda that though Krishna is immeasurable and unlimited, yet he responds
even to my insignificant and imperfect love.
Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, thank you for revealing my anta-sukha, of being able
to know your mind, your pleasures and displeasures.
I rejoice in the ananda of knowing Krishna's mind as to what all pleases him and what all
displeases him.
Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, thank you for revealing my anta-sukha, that all your
instructions, prescriptions and restrictions in Bhagavad Gita are for awakening my soul
happiness.
I rejoice in the ananda of following Krishna's instructions, prescriptions and restrictions,
and I am happy.
Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, thank you for revealing my anta-sukha, of being able
to know your mind, your pleasures and displeasures.
I rejoice in the ananda of following Krishna's instructions, prescriptions and restrictions
in Bhagavad Gita, for my soul happiness.
Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, thank you for revealing my anta-sukha, that you are
alone sanctioning everything for everyone in this world, and I should not have any pinch
of envy towards any jiva possessing anything or any ability more than me, as it amounts
to finding fault with your act of sanctioning these things or ability to that Jiva.
I rejoice in the ananda of being saved from falling into the stool pit of envy arising
from comparison with other jivas.
Everyone is differently disposed of every moment by the perfect justice served by Kala
outside working on the order of Krishna.
Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, thank you for revealing my antasukha of knowing your
mind that you do not like your devotees being proud of possessing the gifts of mercy which
you have bestowed upon them and misusing those gifts to slight others who don't possess
them and exploit it too for lording over other jivas, especially devotees.
I rejoice in the ananda of being saved from falling into the stool pit of pride, saved
from misusing Lord's mercy upon me to encash it for social gain.
Saved from misusing Lord's mercy to exploit anyone for my personal gratification.
All that I have belongs to Srila Prabhupada and the same has to be delicately and exclusively
used in service of Srila Prabhupada and Krishna as their loyal servant.
Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, thank you for revealing my antasukha that you are pleased
if I distribute the gifts which I have bestowed upon you.
Thank you.
I have received from you to all those who seek to have it and not be possessive about
those gifts.
The more I distribute those gifts, the more you are pleased, the more mercy I receive
from you.
I rejoice in the ananda of trying to always share every mercy you have gifted me to all
the jivas as per your wish and direction.
Personal Reciprocation of Krishna
Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu
Thank you for revealing my antasukha that Krishna is seated in my own Heart as my True
Friend out of Absolute Love to help me attain my Eternal Soul-Happiness and soul pleasure
of serving Him.
I rejoice in the ananda of knowing that Krishna is in my heart and he guides me andKrishna
to awaken my Soul-Happiness of Love for Him.
Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu.

Thank you for revealing my anta-sukha that Krishna alone is maintaining me and protecting me. I rejoice in the ananda that I am eternally secure, being loved, cared and protected by Krishna in my heart.
Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, thank you for revealing my anta-sukha that you reduce even my well-deserved material pains and sufferings to enable my devotional service.
I rejoice in the ananda that Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu are in charge of my past karmas and they mercifully dispose them off by decreasing very big sufferings which are due to my past karma.
Just to help me in my devotional service.
Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, thank you for revealing my anta-sukha that you have always provided me resources more than I deserve required for your services.
I rejoice in the ananda that Krishna in my heart is providing me abundance of material resources to serve Srila Prabhupada's plans but only to the extent I can handle without hurting my soul.
There is never a shortage for anything in Krishna Consciousness.

Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, thank you for revealing my anta-sukha that you are always helping me act as my intimate friend by intervening and infusing fresh intelligence into my intelligence to guide me.
I rejoice in the ananda of having an intimate eternal friend in my heart who is constantly guiding me by infusing spiritual knowledge.

I rejoice in the ananda of having an intimate eternal friend in my heart who is constantly guiding me by infusing spiritual intelligence and knowledge into my tiny intelligence as a loving intervention to enable me to remember Krishna always and execute devotional service.
Happiness and Pleasure

the mind but can be restrained easily by injecting the mind with higher taste of
soul happiness of love of Krishna and soul pleasures for devotional service.
I rejoice in the Ananda in becoming indifferent to the offer from bodily ego
of bodily pleasures by keeping my mind always filled with Krishna conscious
happiness and remembering Krishna's words prasanna chetasa param drishtva

Anta Sukha that happiness or dualities of metis,
material happiness and distress, pleasure and pain, victory and defeat, gain and loss
are all nature of material world and we have to tolerate these with the strength of soul
happiness and soul pleasure. I rejoice in the Ananda that dualities of
material world have to be tolerated as impersonal reactions to my past karma. I rejoice in the
Ananda that I am relieved from the torture of material hankering and lamentation as I
now hanker only for Krishna and lament only for having forgotten him for past so many
millions of lives though he was always in my heart. I hate myself having misused my
belief, desire, hope, fulfilment potencies that are meant exclusively for expressing
my love for Krishna.

God in my heart. I will through my imagination paste soul disgust on the pleasure sensation
as poisonous pleasure. I will restrain feeding that habit with all my will power supported
by immediate soul pleasure of pleasing Krishna by that very act of restraint. I will repeatedly
practice this every time the urges rise up irrespective of success or failure. This will
gradually kill all the bad pleasure habits in the subconscious through several cycles
of consistent practice as above. Slowly my chittam and body will be transformed into
taking pleasure only in soul happiness and soul pleasure and minimum mind-body pleasures
that are incidental to devotion.
My Prayers of Surrender
Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, I beg you to give me inspiration, intelligence, determination
and strength to accept only those things that pleases you.
Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, I beg you to give me inspiration, intelligence, determination
and strength to reject all things that displeases you.
Srila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, I beg you to give me inspiration, intelligence, determination and strength to reject all things that displeases you.

Shila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, I beg you to infuse into my mind only those desires that are your desires for me. Shila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, I am always dependent upon you to execute such desires. Without your help, no desires can be fulfilled.
Shila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, may I never forget that I am constitutionally tiny and weak and may remain always meek and humble.
Shila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, I rejoice in the eternal fact that you are my only guardian, maintainer and protector.
Shila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, please save me from falling into the stool pit of pride and envy arising from comparison with other Jivas.
Shila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, I will practice not only to seek respect from other Jivas, but also respect them unconditionally in my heart as they all belong to you.
In my relationship with other Jivas, I will express due respect to them as you would want me to express while maintaining full unconditional respect in my heart.
Shila Prabhupada and Nama Prabhu, please save me from falling into the stool pit of pride and envy arising from comparison with other Jivas.
Thank you very much. Jai Srila Prabhupada. Om Tat Sat.
